title: Soak Test  - Headset connected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: App remains responsive and does not crash after prolonged idle soak test with paired headset on Home Screen
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Pair the Poly Bluetooth headset with the phone via the app.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and verify the headset shows as Connected.
4. Press the Home button (or gesture) to put the app in the background.
5. Leave the phone idle for several hours (e.g., overnight).
6. After the idle period, bring the Poly Studio Mobile app back to the foreground.
7. Observe whether the app is still running, responsive, and the headset connection status is maintained.
expected: The app remains running and responsive after prolonged idle time. No crashes, freezes, or memory-related errors occur. The headset connection status is still displayed correctly on the Home screen.
